step_rationale: Chemokine driving monocyte/macrophage recruitment; LV dilation post-MI suggests plaque inflammation and remodeling.
mechanism: Monocyte-recruiting chemokine promoting plaque inflammation and post-infarction ventricular remodeling.

references.title: Identifying the molecular and cellular signature of cardiac dilation following myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Molecular basis of disease
